name: Encore LP12IP

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F25E9561-9235-48EC-8E65-D55B338927A7

comment: The ADJ Encore LP12IP is a versatile, heavy duty Par with twelve (12) 20W Quad LEDs (4-IN-1: Red, Green, Blue & Lime), a 10° beam angle, and all metal construction. It is IP65 outdoor rated to protect against, rain, snow and dust for temporary outdoor events. It offers flicker free operation for TV and film and linear white color temperature control from 2700K - 7000K. A removable 25-degree frost filter is included.

gwSpecs.description: The ADJ Encore LP12IP is a versatile, heavy duty Par with twelve (12) 20W Quad LEDs (4-IN-1: Red, Green, Blue & Lime), a 10° beam angle, and all metal construction. It is IP65 outdoor rated to protect against, rain, snow and dust for temporary outdoor events. It offers flicker free operation for TV and film and linear white color temperature control from 2700K - 7000K. A removable 25-degree frost filter is included.
